content.en:
Hayes Heavenly Ancestor felt that only by cultivating to break through to the Seven Blood Transformation Realm could he have the strength to destroy the Ancient Blood Snake Clan.

"I didn't expect that it didn't take long for the Endless Heavenly Ancestor to break through to the six Blood Transformation Realm, and it didn't take long to break through to the Seven Blood Transformation Realm so quickly, where did he find the resources?"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor didn't understand.

He had been stranded in the Six Blood Transformation Realm for countless years, and he knew very well that it would be too difficult to break through from the Six Blood Transformation Realm to the Seven Blood Transformation Realm!

What's more, Ye Tian has practiced two primeval techniques, and the difficulty of breaking through is definitely greater.

Of course, Ye Tian actually broke through with the three primeval techniques, but he didn't know it.

......

A sea of sword dust.

Ye Tian spent some years cleaning up this place, arranging formation transformations at the same time, and creating a large amount of land soil.

After all, the Terrans are not suitable for living in the sea, so it is appropriate to make more land.

And there are many treasures that can give birth to a large number of soil resources in the cracks of the territorial waters, so he began to transform them.

Of course, he wouldn't turn the entire Jianchen Sea into land, so he would destroy the structure of the ancient treasure land of the Jianchen Sea.

He only turned one-third of the Jianchen Sea into land.

In this way, Jianchen Sea will also feed back to the land, so that the land can give birth to a large number of resources.

After a period of time, Jianchenhai was completely transformed into a cultivation environment suitable for human habitation.

Of course, the current Jianchen Sea is empty, there is nothing, and the Terrans need to build their own buildings.

However, the human races he moved over are all the elite of the human race, and the lowest cultivation level has the strength of the Great Ancestor, and there will be many Heavenly Ancestors.

Therefore, they will build the building themselves, and he does not need to worry about it.

Wanlong territorial waters.

Ye Tian gathered the high-level Terran leaders one by one and announced the news of relocating a group of Terrans to the Ancient Treasure Land of Jianchen Sea.

Suddenly, many human races were excited.

Once they moved to the Sword Chen Sea Ancient Treasure Land, they knew very well how fast their cultivation speed would grow, and it would definitely be very easy to become a Heavenly Ancestor, and they even had a great hope of becoming a Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

However, Ye Tian would only take away 10 million people.

In the years that followed, many high-ranking Terran leaders showed their natural strength as much as possible in order to compete for places.

But in the end, Ye Xingchen was in charge of screening, and Ye Tian didn't care about this little thing.

After a period of time, the quota was determined, and Ye Tian directly took these 10 million human races from the Wanlong territorial sea and moved to the Jianchen Sea.

Ye Tian packed the 10 million human race with a treasure, and then used the ancient body to move his body, and rushed to the Jianchen Sea as fast as possible.

After arriving at Jianchen Sea, Ye Tian left these human races on the land of Jianchen Sea and let them build their own homes.

And Ye Tian himself also let this replica body sit here, protect the human race, and also practice here.

After all, the cultivation environment here is indeed good, and the energy is also very sufficient, so there is no problem in providing him with cultivation.

When the human race came to a cultivation environment like Jianchen Sea, it was many times stronger than Wan Long Hai.

Moreover, Ye Tian did not take away many ordinary resources of Jianchen Sea, but only took away the top resources and the treasure treasury resources of the Ancient Dragon and Snake Clan.

But the remaining resources are all priceless treasures for these human races, and finding any one of them is enough to make their cultivation skyrocket.

As a result, these Terran cultivators went crazy and joined the army in search of resources, and every once in a short period of time, a group of Terran cultivators cultivated to break through the Great Realm.

Heavenly Ancestors were born one by one, and the number of Heavenly Ancestors increased.

In the Wanlong Territorial Sea, the resources to help the Fifth Stage Great Ancestor break through to become a Heavenly Ancestor are very rare, but they are very common here, and even the resources to help the Heavenly Ancestor of the Fusion Realm break through to become a Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor are also everywhere.

In the first few years of the millions of realms after migrating from the Terran to the Jianchen Sea, the Terrans began to give birth to one blood transformation realm after another.

At the beginning, the human race was in the blood transformation realm of Ye Xingchen and a few others, but now the number has increased rapidly.

Hundred!

Kilobit!

I have to say that the human race is reproducing too fast, and it has great potential, plus now Ye Tian is constantly transforming their bloodline, making their bloodline close to the blood transformation realm race.

Therefore, it is not very difficult for the geniuses of the human race to become a blood transformation realm.

However, it is more difficult for Terran geniuses to break through to more than three blood transformation realms, and most of the Terran blood transformation realms can only break through to one blood transformation realm or two blood transformation realms at best.

Even if it is a Blood Transformation Realm race, the three Blood Transformation Realms are also a threshold, and the number will not be too much.

......

The human race occupies the Jianchen Sea and develops vigorously, and this matter naturally cannot be hidden.

All of a sudden, the cultivator's side or many Blood Transformation Realm races knew about the existence of the human race.

Naturally, Hayes Heavenly Ancestor also knew.

"Terran, this is the race of the Endless Heavenly Ancestor!"

What Hayes Heavenly Ancestor can know from the information he learned is that the Terrans are very weak, and the bloodline is not strong, but there are quite a few of them, so there are more Terrans who have become the Blood Transformation Realm.

But at the beginning, the cultivation of these human races was very average and not worth mentioning.

"These human races are not creatures from the boundary of the territorial waters, they should come from a certain territorial waters, so from this point of view, the Endless Heavenly Ancestor should be the Heavenly Ancestor of a certain territorial waters. His people should be weak, but it doesn't mean that the forces behind him are weak. "

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor thought.

After all, many geniuses have risen from weak races, joined huge forces, and after their strength has improved, they have become strong with their own clansmen and cultivated their own clansmen.

Such an example doesn't show anything, and it can't prove that Ye Tian has no backer behind him.

"Actually, there is no need to discuss whether there is a background behind the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, because the Endless Heavenly Ancestor is now the background itself!"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor said secretly.

The Endless Heavenly Ancestor was an ancient-level genius in the Seven Blood Transformation Realm, and his own combat power was almost invincible in the Nine Blood Transformation Realm.

With such strength, the top forces generally dare not provoke, and only those top hegemon-level forces in the territorial sea boundary will not care.

Therefore, as long as the Endless Heavenly Ancestor did not provoke those top overlord forces, there was almost no risk of falling.

He is very envious of such strength!

It's a pity that he can't break through to the Seven Blood Transformation Realm in a short period of time, and he has to rely on the long years to slowly accumulate the Void Mother Liquid, or find other resources, so that he can hope to improve his strength to the Seven Blood Transformation Realm.

It's a pity that he doesn't have the same great opportunity as the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, so he can only rely on time to get through slowly.

In the blink of an eye, a long time has passed.

At this time, the Terran Race had a complete foothold in the Jianchen Sea, and a large number of Blood Transformation Realms were born, and other weak Great Ancestors also grew up and became Heavenly Ancestors of the Fusion Realm, only a few Terrans failed to break through, which seriously affected the foundation and was sent back to the Wanlong Territorial Sea.
